top_signals.title: Airbus Delays XLR Deliveries to IndiGo as War Hits Supply Chain
top_signals.summary: Airbus SE is falling behind on deliveries of the A321XLR, a longer-range version of its most popular jet, with Indian customer IndiGo unlikely to receive the full batch of nine units this year, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Silver X acquires full ownership of Peru gold project from Barrick
top_signals.summary: In return, Barrick will receive $30,000 in cash consideration, plus a net smelter return royalty with a partial buyback provision.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: No tech, no problem. Dow makes record and traders think these stocks can lead now
top_signals.summary: Traders bought about 5,300 calls in the State Street Health Care Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLV) on Thursday, compared to just over 1,000 puts, according to data from ThinkOrSwim.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: KSM shows how difficult it is to build a mine in Canada
top_signals.summary: In BC especially, miners can still find large deposits despite a global slowdown but they struggle to move them through.
